title: Delicate Crispy Northern Thai Chicken Khanom Thai
description: A crispy and resinous Northern Thai dish featuring shredded Mexican cheese, this kosher-friendly meal is prepared using the papillote method and is perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together paprika, fish sauce, lime juice, and garlic.
Add the chicken to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Let the chicken marinate for at least 30 minutes.
Cut a piece of parchment paper into a large rectangle and brush with coconut oil.
Place the marinated chicken in the center of the parchment paper and top with shredded Mexican cheese.
Fold the parchment paper over the chicken to create a papillote and bake for 25 minutes.
Remove the chicken from the oven and sprinkle with chopped Thai basil.
Serve the chicken hot and enjoy.
